translations.en: a white-haired mage in flowing robes with a mad gleam in his eye.
translations.zh: 白髮法師，身著飄逸長袍，眼中閃爍著瘋狂的光芒。

translations.en: "Get out! Flee before the awesome wrath of the mad mage Sutek!"
translations.zh: 「滾開！在瘋法師蘇特克的可怖怒火面前逃命吧！」

translations.en: "What brings you back to disturb the musings of the @mad mage Sutek again?"
translations.zh: 「是何事使汝再度前來，擾了@mad（瘋法）師蘇特克的沉思？」

translations.en: "So, Avatar, you disturb the musings of the @mad mage Sutek!"
translations.zh: 「哦，聖者，汝竟擾了@mad（瘋法）師蘇特克的沉思！」

translations.en: "What wisdom dost thou seek?"
translations.zh: 「汝欲求何種智慧？」

translations.en: "The name Sutek strikes fear in the hearts of mere mortals!"
translations.zh: 「蘇特克之名令凡夫俗子心生畏懼！」

translations.en: "Everyone knows the name of Sutek the @Mad!"
translations.zh: 「人人皆知@Mad（瘋子）蘇特克之大名！」

translations.en: "Sutek the @Mad is the greatest mage the land has ever known!"
translations.zh: 「@Mad（瘋子）蘇特克乃這片土地有史以來最偉大的法師！」

translations.en: "Balloonist? Yes, Sutek remembers him."
translations.zh: 「熱氣球師？是的，蘇特克記得他。」

translations.en: "He died in Sutek's @catacombs, like most of the others who have ever worked for Sutek!"
translations.zh: 「他死在蘇特克的@catacombs（地）下迷宮，正如多數曾為蘇特克效勞之人的下場！」

translations.en: "Yes! Sutek is mad!"
translations.zh: 「是的！蘇特克確實瘋了！」

translations.en: "They say there is a fine line between genius and madness."
translations.zh: 「人皆言，天才與瘋狂僅一線之隔。」

translations.en: "Well, Sutek hops up and down on that line, cursing the fools that surround him!"
translations.zh: 「嗯，蘇特克就在那條線上蹦來蹦去，詛咒著圍繞他的蠢貨！」

translations.en: "Sutek hired many brilliant engineers to build the catacombs that lie beneath his castle."
translations.zh: 「蘇特克曾雇用許多才華橫溢的工程師，在城堡下方建造地下迷宮。」

translations.en: "The catacombs are filled with the bones of those engineers!"
translations.zh: 「地下迷宮中如今堆滿了那些工程師的白骨！」

translations.en: "The @Pushme-@Pullyu knows where all such bones can be found!"
translations.zh: 「@Pushme（推牠）-@Pullyu（拉牠）知曉所有白骨的所在！」

translations.en: "Sutek created the Pushme-Pullyu as a test for fools!"
translations.zh: 「蘇特克創造推牠-拉牠，是為了測試蠢貨！」

translations.en: "If you can pass the test, you will learn what you wish to know!"
translations.zh: 「若汝能通過測試，便可得知所欲知曉之事！」

translations.en: "What?!"
"Sutek grants thou a piece of wisdom to take to thy grave, and thou refusest it?"
translations.zh: 「蘇特克賜予汝一份帶入墳墓的智慧，汝竟拒絕？」

translations.en: "Then thou must die!"
translations.zh: 「那麼汝必須死！」

translations.en: "How darest thou leave the presence of Sutek the Mad before he has dissmissed you?!"
translations.zh: 「汝怎敢在蘇特克尚未許可之前，擅自離開瘋子蘇特克的面前？！」
translations.note: 原文 dissmissed 為拼寫錯誤，照意譯

translations.en: "If thou art so rude, then I banish thee from my presence!"
translations.zh: 「若汝如此無禮，那吾便驅逐汝離開吾的面前！」

translations.en: "Begone, and pester Sutek no further!"
translations.zh: 「滾！莫再來打擾蘇特克！」

translations.en: "Yes, Sutek knows all about $Z."
translations.zh: 「是的，蘇特克對$Z無所不知。」

translations.en: "But he won't tell you!"
translations.zh: 「但他不告訴汝！」

translations.en: "Only a fool would disturb Sutek with frivolous matters such as that!"
translations.zh: 「只有蠢人才會拿這等瑣事來打擾蘇特克！」

translations.en: "Thy question is answered."
translations.zh: 「汝的問題已得到解答。」

translations.en: "Now flee before the awesome wrath of the mad mage Sutek!"
translations.zh: 「現在在瘋法師蘇特克的可怖怒火面前逃命吧！」

translations.en: "Even the Avatar acknowledges the power and wisdom of Sutek!"
translations.zh: 「連聖者都承認蘇特克的力量與智慧！」

translations.en: "Don't you, $G?"
"Good."
translations.zh: 「很好。」

translations.en: "No?! Then you must die!"
translations.zh: 「不？！那麼汝必須死！」

translations.en: "Dost thou seek employment with Sutek the @Mad?"
translations.zh: 「汝欲投效@Mad（瘋子）蘇特克麾下？」

translations.en: "Well, too bad! Sutek isn't hiring today!"
translations.zh: 「唉，真遺憾！蘇特克今日不收人！」

translations.en: "What sort of fool passes up the opportunity to work for the greatest genius of this age?"
translations.zh: 「何等蠢人才會放棄為這個時代最偉大天才效勞的機會？」

translations.en: "Such fools must die!"
translations.zh: 「這等蠢人必須死！」

translations.en: "But Sutek is mad, and so he will grant you one last nugget of wisdom before thy death!"
translations.zh: 「但蘇特克是個瘋子，所以他將在汝死前賜予最後一點智慧！」

translations.en: "What wouldst thou like to know?"
translations.zh: 「汝想知曉何事？」

translator_notes: 蘇特克瘋法師，全程第三人稱自稱「蘇特克」，說話誇張狂傲，頻繁以死亡威脅訪者。譯文保留其戲劇化語氣。
